---
name: scribe-documentation
description: Documentation workflow for feature delivery, requirements traceability, and technical notes. Use this when updating markdown docs alongside implementation.
---

Use this skill whenever behavior, requirements, architecture, or testing guidance changes.

## Documentation deliverables

Update the relevant documents:

- epic requirements
- architecture notes
- testing strategy
- peer review notes
- release or delivery summary

## Style rules

- Be concrete.
- Document actual behavior, not aspirations.
- List assumptions explicitly.
- Keep open questions visible.
- Prefer short sections over large narrative blocks.

## Traceability format

For each story or subfeature, capture:

- requirement id
- summary
- implementation notes
- tests added
- docs updated
- open issues
